data_card.headline: Household space pressure with composition context
data_card.summary: Use Census overcrowding for structural local insight, not short-term change.
data_card.why_this_dataset: Highest fit for intent, geography availability, and release discipline.
why_not_others: Alternative series have mismatched geography or frequency.
Some related series are provisional and not directly comparable.
accessibility_notes: Include plain-language caveat summary above chart.
Provide table view and downloadable CSV alternative.
Do not rely on colour alone for chart distinction.
